  • 快速开始
  • 部署
  • 配置

使用指南

  • 上传图片
  • API 参考
  • 存储后端
  • ShareX 集成

进阶

  • 内容审核

存储后端

PicFast 支持多种存储后端，通过后台管理界面进行配置。

本地存储

将文件存储在本地文件系统。最简单的方案，适合单服务器部署。

{
  "type": "local",
  "root": "/data/uploads",
  "url": "https://pics.example.com/uploads"
}

S3 兼容存储

支持 AWS S3、MinIO、Cloudflare R2 等 S3 兼容对象存储服务。

{
  "type": "s3",
  "endpoint": "https://s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com",
  "region": "us-east-1",
  "bucket": "my-picfast",
  "access_key": "AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE",
  "secret_key": "wJalrXUtnFEMI/K7MDENG/bPxRfiCYEXAMPLEKEY",
  "url": "https://my-picfast.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com"
}

阿里云 OSS

{
  "type": "oss",
  "endpoint": "oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com",
  "bucket": "my-picfast",
  "access_key": "your-access-key",
  "secret_key": "your-secret-key",
  "url": "https://my-picfast.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com"
}

腾讯云 COS

{
  "type": "cos",
  "bucket_url": "https://my-picfast.cos.ap-guangzhou.myqcloud.com",
  "secret_id": "your-secret-id",
  "secret_key": "your-secret-key",
  "url": "https://my-picfast.cos.ap-guangzhou.myqcloud.com"
}

七牛云 Kodo

{
  "type": "kodo",
  "access_key": "your-access-key",
  "secret_key": "your-secret-key",
  "bucket": "my-picfast",
  "domain": "https://pics.example.com",
  "zone": "zone0"
}

WebDAV

{
  "type": "webdav",
  "endpoint": "https://dav.example.com",
  "username": "user",
  "password": "password",
  "url": "https://dav.example.com/pics"
}

切换后端

已存储在某个后端的图片不受影响。切换默认后端后，新上传的图片会写入新后端，已有图片继续从原位置提供访问。

PicFast

开源、自托管的图片托管服务
